_comment: Friendly Rivalry (LTR, {R}{G} instant): 'Target creature you control and up to one other target legendary creature you control each deal damage equal to their power to target creature you don't control.' Flow: cast Friendly Rivalry ({R}{G}). Target 0 = your Grizzly Bears (2/2). Target 1 (up to one OTHER legendary creature you control) = Frodo Baggins (1/3 legendary) — note you must NOT be able to pick Grizzly Bears again here, nor Frodo for both: 'other' is enforced (TargetOther / CR 601.2c). Target 2 = Opponent's Hill Giant (3/3). On resolution it takes 2 (Bears) + 1 (Frodo) = 3 damage and dies.
